sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112781" key="futou/rghma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῠτούργ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n112781.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">care of plants, planting,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:140" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.140</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
